gradient_history: browser_transfer:selection:select_then_submit: Transfer source-domain failure into a reusable rule: After selecting required checkbox, radio, filter, or list options, click the final Submit, Save, Apply, or Checkout control exactly once.

browser_transfer:search:search_before_detail: Transfer source-domain failure into a reusable rule: Use search or filtering controls to locate the target item before opening or editing its detail page.

browser_transfer:recovery:avoid_repeated_browser_action: Transfer source-domain failure into a reusable rule: Avoid repeating the same browser action after it fails or stops changing the page; choose the next required control instead.
browser_policy.name: browser_policy
browser_policy.value:
Follow visible instructions, use only allowed actions, and avoid hidden benchmark answers.

Seed rules:
- Fill all required fields before submitting or saving a browser form.

Learned rules:
- After selecting required checkbox, radio, filter, or list options, click the final Submit, Save, Apply, or Checkout control exactly once.
- Use search or filtering controls to locate the target item before opening or editing its detail page.
- Avoid repeating the same browser action after it fails or stops changing the page; choose the next required control instead.
